pageContext.name: Harley Quinn 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The thrilling Faces of Gotham™ Silver Coin Collection is back again with its seventh release, featuring the Clown Princess of Crime, HARLEY QUINN™.   This 1oz pure silver coin is colored and shaped to highlight the flamboyant anti-heroine. Some light relief has been added to the design to create further impact. To confirm the coin as legal tender, the Ian Rank Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II is finely engraved on the obverse.   Created in partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, the coin arrives in a custom-designed box, including a large window for display. If you'd like to take a closer look, you can do so without worry as the coin is safely secured in an acrylic capsule. A Certificate of Authenticity and the coin's unique serial number in the mintage of 5,000 coins are printed on the box.   This is one quintessential collectible! Order today before you miss out.
